task_description: Implement a Smart Workspace Reminder & Wellness System for the ThoughtFlow mind-map application. This includes: reminder data model and persistence, a full-featured ReminderPanel with CRUD/search/import/export/backup/restore, a scheduling engine supporting time-based intervals/workspace-open/long-session detection/random mode, non-intrusive notification toasts, toolbar integration with Bell icon, and R keyboard shortcut.
